message:
Command `# Yosys still running — wait with longer poll intervals, total timeout 2.5h
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
LR_PID=214817

echo "Monitoring synthesis. Poll every 5 min..."
i=0
while kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; do
  i=$((i+1))
  sleep 300
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  STEP=$(ls -t /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/ 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  YTAIL=$(tail -2 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ')
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | step=$STEP | synth_lines=$LINES | $YTAIL"
done

echo ""
echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LibreLane finished. Final log tail:"
tail -40 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log` executed with exit code -1.
